settings.title: Product details
settings.content: Material, pendant size, chain length, and care instructions go here.

settings.title: How engraving works
settings.content: 1. Pick your metal and how many sides to engrave — the price updates as you choose. 2. Type each side (or tap “Find my coordinates”) and watch the preview draw it exactly as we laser it. 3. We send a photo proof before it ships.
